arts.ttl: 'I felt a bit like the scapegoat' - Bellingham
arts.sum: Real Madrid's Jude Bellingham says he has got his smile back after "feeling a bit like the scapegoat" for England's failure to win Euro 2024.

arts.ttl: Liverpool receive triple injury boost as Alexander-Arnold update issued
arts.sum: Liverpool have been handed a major injury boost as Trent Alexander-Arnold returned to training ahead of facing Real Madrid in the Uefa Champions League on Wednesday. The right-back sustained a hamstring injury during the 2-0 win over Aston Villa, forcing him off the pitch at halftime, earlier this month. arts.ttl: Mascherano appointed as new Inter Miami coach
arts.sum: Inter Miami have confirmed that former Liverpool, Barcelona and Argentina defender Javier Mascherano will take over as the team's new head coach.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot admits Real Madrid carry Champions League aura
arts.sum: Real have won the competition a record 15 times, twice beating Liverpool in the final.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid star knows Liverpool want revenge – Can’t help bringing up recent past
arts.sum: Real Madrid goalkeepers Thibaut Courtois has admitted he knows Liverpool are gunning for revenge when they face each other in the Champions League this week. Tele Madrid cover comments from the Belgian goalkeeper today as he gears up to travel to Anfield to take on Arne Slot’s Liverpool side on Wednesday. arts.ttl: Liverpool must act on Salah situation - Sutton
arts.sum: Monday Night Club's Chris Sutton and Rory Smith discuss Mohamed Salah's contract situation at Liverpool.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot breaks silence on Mohamed Salah's Liverpool contract bombshell - and reveals how stand-off might be BENEFITING Egyptian star ahead of Real Madrid clash
arts.sum: The Egyptian forward sent shockwaves through football on Monday when he revealed he was disappointed in the club for not putting a new contract on the table.

arts.ttl: What Man United's jarring financial results reveal about Ruben Amorim, wasteful spending and why they must learn from Liverpool
arts.sum: MIKE KEEGAN: Amorim did not have to wait long to get his first reminder of the task he has taken on at Manchester United when his new charges limped to a 1-1 draw away at Ipswich Town.
